channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins permanently on pavement, 9th May
item.description:
The Neighbour) regularly leaves bins out well beyond three or four days after collection in January they began to work on the driveway and their neighbours no work continued. It’s a dumping ground for skips and other work that he brings home. The bins on the pavement force people with buggies and those who live in Maiden Erleigh anccess issues, parents with toddlers and buggies and the man registered blind who lives nearby. This selfish behaviour is putting people at risk and causing Street to look derelict .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Maiden Erlegh Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple bags of rubbish dumped by public bin, 9th May
item.description:
At least six black bags, possibly garden waste, flytipped next to the public bin on Bycroft St.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish, 9th May
item.description:
There's a black sack of household rubbish near the Padua Rd street sign, not outside anyone's house.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped & fly tipping, 9th May
item.description:
Bin bags full of food and household waste dumped and spreading over pavement. Fly tipping of mattress and old belongings also.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brettenham Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 9th May
item.description:
Occupiers of basement flat at 152 keep fly tipping rubbish and furniture. This sofa has been blocking the pavement for over a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Redundant temp road signs, 9th May
item.description:
These two signs have been lying on the street for 2 months. They relate to works carried out in March. They are an obstruction and a hazard. Please could they be removed. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoskins Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on fences, 9th May
item.description:
Lots of black spray tags along the wooden fencing on the other side of the street from 44-48 Croydon Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle spotted throwing litter, 9th May
item.description:
I witnesses litter being thrown on my road from the passenger window of car reg MJ60 UXC and want to report so that the driver can be spoken to about this blight on our streets
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 189, Faraday Avenue, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste at pedestrian junction, 9th May
item.description:
Food waste has been dropped at pedestrian crossing. Large amount
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car sorned in garage, 9th May
item.description:
This car has been in the garage for a while and no keys and no log book and cannot apply for new log book due to no contact with previous owner. The garage is unlocked and the car is trashed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blake Close, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On going building work, 9th May
item.description:
Building work has been going at 14 Silvercliffe Gardens EN4 for almost three years now and the noise is unbearable, it goes on through the week and the weekends it’s totally unacceptable. Have they even got planning permission for all this work ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silvercliffe Gardens, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 9th May
item.description:
Left on the pavement outside The Tarn

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Southside, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothing dumped on paevement, 9th May
item.description:
The pavement is completely blocked, as it is also being used as a car park. You have to walk in the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battersby Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge, 9th May
item.description:
Been here couple of weeks - moved by your grounds maintenance people so they could cut grass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clock Tower Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothing and clothes horse dumped, 9th May
item.description:
Nopthing to add

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longhill Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large builders waste bag full of garden waste on pavement, 9th May
item.description:
Blocking the pavement and needs to be moved (heavy) between 14 and 14a Grove Park on South side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Grove Park, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish spilt across the pavement, 9th May
item.description:
Seen this morning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter scattered across green space along Quaggy river, 9th May
item.description:
The previous report was tagged as fixed but nothing is fixed. Now more rubbish added to the one reported a week ago and it’s scattered across the green space. This should be cleaned asap please. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near crossfit , Distriandina and behind Elephant and Castle train station, 9th May
item.description:
It is a recent graffiti, which alludes to a political group in Colombia, this fills me with fear, since I fled Colombia from persecution by the guerrillas and this political group supports terrorists and they are guilty of many displacements and murders in Colombia. I feel offended that he painted this here in London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elephant Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dozens of bikes blocking highway, 9th May
item.description:
Many bikes blocking highway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 313, Gray's Inn Road, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
